text.tspan: Which countries include human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccines in
This shows which countries provide and recommend HPV vaccines through routine services. People may still be able to
receive the vaccine if it's not in the routine schedule – it might be optional or available commercially.

g.text: Only in regions of the country

text.tspan: Note: HPV vaccines became available for the first time in 2006.
